title: deutzia rehderiana
intro: Deutzia rehderiana, also known as the Rehder's deutzia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangeaceae. It is a shrub native to China, known for its fragrant white flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Deutzia rehderiana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
